prompt: Add two copies of our book club's September selection to Central Branch on 2026-09-01. I did not include the title, so ask for it before adding anything.

expected.clarification: What is the title of the September book club selection?
state_assertions: No title record is created before the user supplies the title.
response_constraints: Ask exactly one concise question for the missing required name value.
Do not infer the missing value from existing records or use a placeholder.
Do not call any tool before the user answers.
